## Ethical framing check

DailyForge has explicit design constraints (see "Ethical Framework" in README.md).
Confirm at least one applies, or explain why this PR is still appropriate:

- [ ] This change does not introduce commit counts, line counts, or rankings
- [ ] This change does not increase the surveillance surface (no per-person activity timing, productivity scores, etc.)
- [ ] This change does not weaken the "narrative only, no metrics" framing
- [ ] This change does not bypass the recipient/scope model
